'''Red Squadron''' was the training unit formed by members of [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]], to learn how to use [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE Defenders]]. They chose the name as a tribute to the [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] that had destroyed both [[Death Star/Legends|Death Stars]], as a means of antagonizing their [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] partner, [[Ysanne Isard]]. For the mission, they formed [[Requiem Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Isard's Revenge]]''
